resources.string:
IMPORTANT LEGAL DISCLAIMER

 This application ("IPTV Player") is a generic media player designed to play streaming content via the Xtream Codes API protocol.

 THIS APP DOES NOT:
 • Host, store, or distribute any media content
 • Provide, sell, or pre-configure any IPTV subscriptions
 • Endorse or encourage the use of unauthorized streaming services
 • Contain any links to copyrighted or illegal content

 USER RESPONSIBILITY:
 You are solely responsible for ensuring that any content you access through this application is legally licensed and that you have the right to access such content in your jurisdiction.

 The developers of this application are not liable for any misuse of the application or violation of any applicable laws by end users. Use of this application to access copyrighted content without authorization is strictly prohibited and may be illegal.

 By using this application, you agree that you will only use it with content you are legally permitted to access.
